title: Hate Mace Retexture
description: Turns the Mace into Hatemonger's Hate-Mace from the Space King series.
body: Turns the Mace into Hatemonger's Hate-Mace from the Space King series. Go support FlashGitz so they continue to Produce Space King. (Ignore the outdated version warning, it'll work regardless at least as of 1.21.10 as its just a simple Mace retexture.)
